nasb.text: She has wearied Me with toil, Yet her great rust has not gone from her; Let her rust be in the fire!

esv.text: She has wearied herself with toil; its abundant corrosion does not go out of it. Into the fire with its corrosion!

cnv.text: 這鍋真叫人疲累！ 它厚厚的鏽總沒法除掉， 就是用火也不能除掉。

ccb.text: 却徒劳无功，因为锈垢太厚，就是用火也不能清除。
